'''Senta''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Belasco/Legends|Belasco]]. It was constructed centuries before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The city was home to the palace were the royal family that ruled Belasco lived. It sat on top the golden hills that overlooked the [[Great Sea (Belasco)|Great Sea]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]'' {{1st}}
